presentation.chiefComplaint: Twisted my ankle playing basketball, it is swollen

history.hpi: Inverted the right ankle landing from a jump two hours ago. Swelling and lateral tenderness, able to bear weight with a limp. No numbness. No deformity.
redFlags: Apply Ottawa ankle rules to decide if X-ray is needed

expert.esiRationale: Isolated minor extremity injury, stable, weight-bearing, no high-risk features. Expected to need one resource (an ankle X-ray per Ottawa rules). One resource -> ESI 4.

provenance.sourceRef: ED Triage Trainer hand-authored seed case
